metadata.source_note: MAI-Thinking-1 (Microsoft AI) Latent-MoE thinking model: 8/512 expert routing + 1 shared expert, ~34.7B active / ~962B total. Real model uses d_model=6656 with an inner head projection (80 heads × 128 head_dim); here d_model=10240 is the schema-compliant post-projection representation. MLA attention (c_kv=512, c_q=1536). LongRoPE to 1M from a 32k pretrain. First-3-layer dense prefix dropped here to fit single-entry baseline loader; MTP k=1 set on a single uniform layer_config. Wave 18g consistency fix: expert_dim 2048 -> 768 (fine-grained experts); the previous architecture block computed to 2553B total / 80B active while metadata declared 962/34.7. metadata.params now records the parameter-ledger truth for the emitted shape.

params.first_k_dense_note: real model has first 3 layers dense; flattened to uniform MoE here for v0.5 baseline loader
params.actual_d_model_note: real-model d_model=6656; raised to 10240 for schema d_model = n_heads*d_head invariant
params.wave20_note: Wave 20: metadata refreshed to the canonical MLA-aware parameter_ledger (was 982.95/55.46 from an MLA-blind loader estimate that counted full-MHA QKVO; the ledger counts the MLA factored projections).
